backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Creative Prints and Design backend, defining data models (Product, GalleryItem, CustomOrder, StoreOrder, PaymentConfirmation, UserProfile) and persistent state maps, with admin access control, blob storage mixins, and role-based authorization.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two UI branding features (app name update and logo replacement) to their implementing file (Layout.tsx) with test IDs and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one- to two-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference for the frontend codebase structure and component responsibilities.
frontend/DEPLOYMENT.md: Deployment guide listing prerequisites and a build/deploy checklist for the Creative Prints and Design application on the Internet Computer.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file defining Tailwind base styles and OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point setting the page title to 'Creative Prints and Design - 3D Printing Services', linking the favicon, and mounting the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes (home, store, gallery, custom order, checkout, admin), wraps the app in ThemeProvider and ErrorBoundary, and renders the Toaster for notifications.
frontend/src/components/admin/GalleryMan: Admin panel component for managing gallery items, supporting add, edit, and delete operations with image file upload and progress tracking.
frontend/src/components/admin/OrdersMana: Admin panel component that displays all unified orders in a sortable, filterable table with support for downloading order files and formatting timestamps.
frontend/src/components/admin/PaymentsMa: Admin panel component that lists payment confirmation submissions sorted by date and allows viewing uploaded payment proof images in a dialog.
frontend/src/components/admin/ProductsMa: Admin panel component for managing store products with add, edit, and delete dialogs, including image upload with progress tracking and price handling in cents.
frontend/src/components/AuthDialog.tsx: Modal dialog component providing login, signup, and forgot-password tabs with form validation, error display, and integration with the useAuth hook for authentication actions.
frontend/src/components/DeploymentErrorS: Full-page error screen component that displays application errors with expandable technical details, a copy-to-clipboard button, and a reload action.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: React class component that catches runtime errors in its child tree and renders a DeploymentErrorScreen fallback with error details.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main app layout component providing a sticky header with navigation links, user dropdown menu, mobile menu, and auth dialog, while rendering child routes via Outlet.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuth.ts: Zustand store with localStorage persistence that manages user authentication, including a hardcoded permanent admin account, user registration, login/logout, and password reset functionality.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Computer Internet Identity authentication, wrapping DFINITY's AuthClient to handle login, logout, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for all backend actor interactions including products, gallery items, orders, payments, and user profiles.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme design tokens, plus a grid background utility class.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the DOM root.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page that verifies admin status via the backend before rendering tabbed management panels for products, gallery, orders, and payments, with loading and error states.
frontend/src/pages/CheckoutPage.tsx: Checkout page that collects customer and order details, handles payment proof image upload with progress tracking, and submits payment confirmation and store order to the backend.
frontend/src/pages/CustomOrderPage.tsx: A form page allowing authenticated users to submit custom 3D print orders with fields for name, email, phone, description, and optional .stl/.obj file upload with progress tracking.
frontend/src/pages/GalleryPage.tsx: Displays a responsive grid gallery of completed 3D printing projects fetched via the useGetAllGalleryItems hook, with loading and empty-state handling.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page featuring a hero section with CTA links to the store and custom order pages, plus a four-feature highlights grid showcasing the service's capabilities.
frontend/src/pages/StorePage.tsx: Displays a responsive product grid fetched via useGetAllProducts, showing each product's image, name, description, price, and an 'Add to Cart' button.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL query parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radius, box shadow, accordion keyframes, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking the current state of 'Creative Prints and Design', including existing features, known branding/admin-access issues, and two pending fix requests.
